title: Multi-Matrix Heavy Metal Testing Protocol with Chelation Challenge
author: Olcay, Ayhan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol outlines a comprehensive method for assessing chronic heavy metal burden and chelatable metal pools using a combination of chelation challenge and multi-matrix sample collection (urine, blood, sweat, and saliva). The protocol integrates KXRF, LXRF, and ICP-MS for high-sensitivity analysis. Baseline and post-chelation samples are collected at strategic timepoints to quantify metal excretion and guide detox interventions. The approach enhances diagnostic accuracy and personalizes heavy metal detoxification strategies.
